title: Mouse Perfusion Protocol
steps: Place mouse in isoflurane chamber until unresponsive to toe pinch stimuli.
Proceed to cut abdominal skin down both sides to expose the diaphragm.
Cut around diaphragm to expose the heart.
Cut right atria and insert perfusion needle into left ventricle with pump set to 5 rpm, °C, .
Perfuse 80 mL - 100 mL K+-free PBS until the liver is clear and liquid expelling from heart is completely clear.
Carefully remove brain and cut on mid-sagittal line using brain matrix.
Drop-fix left hemisphere in cold 4% paraformaldehyde for histological processing.
Sub-dissect right hemisphere for regions of interest.
creator: Jane Balster
